sourceTitle: Using AI in university | Current Students – UNSW Sydney
evidenceSnippetOriginal: It's important that students are aware of what tools use generative AI and may be inappropriate in an assessment. For example, Grammarly, Quillbot and translation tools such as Google Translate, DeepL and Baidu Translate are forms of generative AI.
evidenceLocator: FAQ section 'How does Turnitin's AI detection tool work?'
